title: Greeting and Introducing Yourself
prompt: Greet someone and introduce yourself in English.
hint: Use phrases like 'Good morning', 'Nice to meet you', and 'My name is...'.
sample: Good morning! Nice to meet you. My name is Kate.

ja.prompt: 誰かに挨拶して自己紹介してください。
ja.hint: 'Good morning', 'Nice to meet you', 'My name is...' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Good morning! Nice to meet you. My name is Kate.

zh.prompt: 用英文向某人打招呼並自我介紹。
zh.hint: 使用 'Good morning', 'Nice to meet you', 'My name is...' 等片語。
zh.sample: Good morning! Nice to meet you. My name is Kate.

title: Asking and Answering About Objects
prompt: Ask and answer questions about objects using 'What's this?' and 'It's a...'.
hint: Use 'What's this?' to ask about an object and answer with 'It's a...' plus the object's name.

ja.prompt: 'What's this?' を使って物について質問し、'It's a...' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'What's this?' で物を尋ね、'It's a...' と物の名前で答えましょう。

zh.prompt: 使用 'What's this?' 問物品，並用 'It's a...' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'What's this?' 問物品，回答時說 'It's a...' 加上物品名稱。

title: Talking About Abilities
prompt: Talk about what you can or cannot do using 'Can you...?' and 'Yes, I can' or 'No, I can't'.
hint: Use 'Can you...' to ask about abilities and answer with 'Yes, I can' or 'No, I can't'.
sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can.

ja.prompt: 'Can you...?' を使って能力について話し、'Yes, I can' または 'No, I can't' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'Can you...' で能力を尋ね、'Yes, I can' または 'No, I can't' で答えましょう。
ja.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can.

zh.prompt: 用 'Can you...?' 詢問能力，並用 'Yes, I can' 或 'No, I can't' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'Can you...' 問能力，回答時用 'Yes, I can' 或 'No, I can't'。
zh.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can.

title: Talking About Time and Daily Routine
prompt: Ask and answer about daily routines and times using 'What time do you...?' and 'I... at...'.
hint: Use 'What time do you get up?' and answer with 'I get up at six.'
sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

ja.prompt: 日課や時間について 'What time do you...?' を使って質問し、'I... at...' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'What time do you get up?' と尋ね、'I get up at six.' と答えましょう。
ja.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

zh.prompt: 用 'What time do you...?' 問日常作息和時間，並用 'I... at...' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'What time do you get up?' 問，回答 'I get up at six.'。
zh.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

title: Describing People and Relationships
prompt: Ask and answer questions about people and their relationships using 'Who is he/she?' and 'He/She is my...'.
hint: Use 'Who is he?' and answer with 'He is my teacher.'
sample: Who is she? She is my mom.

ja.prompt: 'Who is he/she?' を使って人や関係について質問し、'He/She is my...' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'Who is he?' と尋ね、'He is my teacher.' と答えましょう。
ja.sample: Who is she? She is my mom.

zh.prompt: 用 'Who is he/she?' 問人和關係，並用 'He/She is my...' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'Who is he?' 問，回答 'He is my teacher.'。
zh.sample: Who is she? She is my mom.

title: Shopping and Asking Prices
prompt: Ask for help and prices in a store using 'May I help you?' and 'How much is it?'.
hint: Use 'May I help you?' to offer help and 'How much is it?' to ask the price.
sample: May I help you? How much is it? It's five dollars.

ja.prompt: 店で 'May I help you?' と 'How much is it?' を使って助けを求めたり値段を聞いたりしてください。
ja.hint: 'May I help you?' で助けを申し出て、'How much is it?' で値段を尋ねましょう。
ja.sample: May I help you? How much is it? It's five dollars.

zh.prompt: 在商店用 'May I help you?' 和 'How much is it?' 詢問幫助和價格。
zh.hint: 用 'May I help you?' 提供幫助，'How much is it?' 問價格。
zh.sample: May I help you? How much is it? It's five dollars.

title: Talking About Weather and Clothing
prompt: Talk about the weather and what to wear using phrases like 'It's cold and windy' and 'Put on your coat'.
hint: Describe the weather and suggest clothing accordingly.
sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

ja.prompt: 天気や服装について 'It's cold and windy' や 'Put on your coat' のようなフレーズを使って話してください。
ja.hint: 天気を説明し、それに合った服装を提案しましょう。
ja.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

zh.prompt: 用 'It's cold and windy' 和 'Put on your coat' 等片語談論天氣和穿著。
zh.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

title: Giving Directions
prompt: Ask for and give directions using phrases like 'Excuse me, where is...?' and 'Go straight and turn right.'
hint: Use polite expressions to ask and clear instructions to give directions.
sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

ja.prompt: 'Excuse me, where is...?' や 'Go straight and turn right.' のようなフレーズを使って道を尋ねたり教えたりしてください。
ja.hint: 丁寧な表現で尋ね、わかりやすい指示で道案内しましょう。
ja.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

zh.prompt: 用 'Excuse me, where is...?' 和 'Go straight and turn right.' 等片語問路和指路。
zh.hint: 用禮貌語句問路，用清楚指示指路。
zh.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

title: Talking About Hobbies and Sports
prompt: Talk about your favorite sports and hobbies using 'I like...' and 'I play...'.
hint: Use simple sentences to express likes and activities.
sample: I like basketball. I play basketball every day.

ja.prompt: 'I like...' や 'I play...' を使って好きなスポーツや趣味について話してください。
ja.hint: 簡単な文で好きなことや活動を表現しましょう。
ja.sample: I like basketball. I play basketball every day.

zh.prompt: 用 'I like...' 和 'I play...' 談論喜歡的運動和興趣。
zh.hint: 用簡單句子表達喜好和活動。
zh.sample: I like basketball. I play basketball every day.

title: Describing Animals and Counting
prompt: Describe animals and count them using 'How many...?' and numbers.
hint: Ask 'How many tigers are there?' and answer with the number.

ja.prompt: 'How many...?' を使って動物を数えたり説明したりしてください。
ja.hint: 'How many tigers are there?' と尋ね、数字で答えましょう。

zh.prompt: 用 'How many...?' 敘述動物並計數。
zh.hint: 問 'How many tigers are there?' 並用數字回答。
